name: bridge
description: Bridge — the orchestrator's plugin in the Agiterra Multi-Agent Toolkit. Re-exposes a curated crew + wire MCP surface (so orchestrators install one plugin) and adds composite tools (spawn, handoff, close, health, compose_brief, pane_near) that collapse the orchestrator's multi-step dances into single calls. Capability-specific behavior ships as separate bridge-X integration plugins (bridge-github, bridge-linear, etc.), discovered via installed_plugins.json scan.
